creator: trasz@pin.if.uz.zgora.pl
text:
Update to 2.0.r1, add VST support (disabled by default due to legal reasons)
and clean things a bit.  This PR obsoletes ports/111029.

Added file(s):
- files/patch-libs-fst-SConscript
- files/patch-libs-fst-jackvst.h
- files/patch-libs-fst-vsti.c
- files/patch-libs-pbd-stacktrace.cc
- files/patch-vst-SConscript

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
